description: Lock Interchangeable Parts to precision machine-tool-enabled industrial component interchangeability rather than broad construction, backwards mass-production, or rifling-specific scope.

checks.reason: Precision machine tools and gauges are the direct source-backed manufacturing substrate for industrial interchangeable components.
Mass production is downstream manufacturing scale, not the prerequisite for interchangeable parts.
Generic construction does not supply the tolerances, gauges, or machine tools for the scoped industrial manufacturing method.
Rifles were an application context, but rifling grooves are not the manufacturing substrate for interchangeable parts.
The current 1775 breech-loading scope predates source-pinned 19th-century interchangeable armory-manufacturing practice.
